summary: Numeric Leak Gate implemented successfully. Created gates.py module with SRAP gate definitions, GateExecutor class, and WhitelistManager. Added CI workflow (.github/workflows/srap-gates.yml) with numeric-leak-gate, gate-validation, whitelist-management, and nightly-gate-report jobs. Threshold configured at 0.01 (1%). False positive handling via whitelist patterns that respect emotion keyword context. Created runbook at docs/runbook-numeric-leak-gate.md. All 42 tests passing (20 new gate tests + 22 existing self_report_check tests). Validated against shadow_log.jsonl samples.
